privileged_info_summary: The timelapse_map_outbreak task uses standard Epi Info 7 features to create a time-lapse map visualization. The metadata specifies standard epidemiological field names confirmed in CDC documentation: OnsetDate for time-based animation, Latitude and Longitude for geographic positioning. The .map7 file format is confirmed as Epi Info 7's standard map configuration format. The Atlanta_Outbreak.csv dataset is synthetic data created at runtime by a setup script (not present in repository), not derived from actual CDC outbreak data. The task expects the final map configuration to be saved as outbreak_spread.map7 in the Windows Documents folder, and the verifier checks that the XML configuration contains references to the data source and proper time-lapse settings.
